title: 7 Best Sendinblue Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare the best Sendinblue alternatives. Find affordable email marketing tools with SMS, automation, and CRM features.
h1: Best Sendinblue Alternatives for Email Marketing & CRM
intro: Whether you're looking for better pricing, more advanced features, or a platform tailored to your specific industry, there are several excellent alternatives to Sendinblue available. We've compared the top options to help you find the right email marketing solution for your business needs.
why_switch: More affordable pricing for your subscriber count or feature needs
Better user experience or customer support ratings
Advanced automation capabilities or superior CRM integration
Specialized tools for your business type (creators, agencies, e-commerce)

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the most competitive pricing starting at just $9/month with unlimited contacts, making it ideal if cost is your primary concern. With a clean drag-and-drop editor, automation workflows, and landing pages, it delivers professional features without the complexity of larger platforms.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is specifically designed for newsletter creators with built-in monetization, referral programs, and an ad network—features Sendinblue lacks. If growing a paid subscriber base is your goal, Beehiiv's growth-focused tools make it the better choice.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for content creators with visual automations, subscriber tagging, built-in commerce, and landing pages optimized for lead generation. Its creator-centric approach and 30% recurring affiliate commission make it superior for bloggers and online educators.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp remains the most user-friendly entry point with a 500-contact free tier and intuitive interface, plus excellent integration with e-commerce platforms. Its A/B testing, segmentation, and automation tools rival Sendinblue at a lower starting price of $13/month.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign excels in sophisticated marketing automation, lead scoring, and site tracking for businesses ready to grow beyond basics. While it requires paid plans from the start, its advanced features justify the investment for serious marketing operations.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with predictive analytics, SMS integration, and seamless Shopify/WooCommerce connections that drive higher ROI for online stores. If your revenue depends on e-commerce, Klaviyo's retail-focused features outperform Sendinblue.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse combines email marketing with built-in webinars, online courses, and funnel-building tools ideal for educators and coaches. Its integrated approach eliminates the need for multiple platforms when hosting webinars or selling digital products.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Sendinblue?
faq.a: MailerLite and Mailchimp both offer strong free tiers with unlimited campaigns. MailerLite provides up to 1,000 contacts free with no daily send limits, while Mailchimp offers 500 contacts with more advanced automation features. For pure value, MailerLite's unlimited monthly sends make it the better free option.

faq.q: What is the best Sendinblue alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses due to its affordable pricing ($9/month), user-friendly interface, and comprehensive feature set including automation, landing pages, and pop-ups. ActiveCampaign is a better choice if you need advanced CRM and lead scoring for serious sales operations.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite at $9/month and GetResponse at $19/month both undercut Sendinblue's $25/month entry price. For the absolute lowest cost with powerful features, MailerLite offers the best value, while still providing automation and landing pages comparable to Sendinblue.
